Here is the full picture of the plugin registration issue:

## Findings

### How the plugin loads
- **Service**: `claude-bot.service` runs `start-claude-bot.sh`, which launches `launch-claude.py`
- **Launch command**: `claude --plugin-dir /mnt/data/discord-plugin --dangerously-load-development-channels plugin:discord-clungus@local`
- The `--plugin-dir` flag points to `/mnt/data/discord-plugin/` which contains a valid `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` with name `discord-clungus` version `0.0.4`
